page: Microsoft Azure DC2es_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCEV6 family. It is equipped with an Intel processor providing 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This virtual machine runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach external high-performance storage volumes.

The hardware configuration features zero integrated GPUs and does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With a dedicated CPU allocation, the instance avoids the resource contention typical of shared-core environments, offering predictable compute performance for its size. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the entry-level 2-vCPU resource density makes it a low-overhead option for workloads requiring dedicated Intel execution threads without the cost of larger, multi-core allocations.

Classified within the memory-optimized DCEV6 family, this server is configured for lightweight database tasks, small-scale caching layers, and general-purpose workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and Premium Storage compatibility. The absence of local storage and GPUs makes it unsuitable for data-intensive local processing or accelerated graphics workloads, directing its utility toward network-attached storage architectures and basic enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure DC2es_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEV6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance lacks local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing the attachment of external persistent volumes. It contains no GPUs and offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the server provides predictable performance for entry-level workloads. Qualitatively, this configuration offers a low-overhead entry point for applications requiring dedicated Intel processing threads without the expense of larger instances. It is suited for lightweight database tasks, small caching layers, and general-purpose enterprise applications utilizing network-attached storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC2es_v6 is a DCEV6-family virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for lightweight database and general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated two-vCPU Intel instance with eight gigabytes of memory and premium storage support for predictable, low-overhead workloads.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
8.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage
Best suited for lightweight databases and general-purpose workloads
